summary: Russian forces used FPV drones to destroy a Ukrainian T-64 tank in Konstantinivka, despite the crew's efforts to extinguish the fire and restore cover. Ukrainian FPV drones successfully targeted Russian Gerbera drone launchers in Crimea, causing significant damage. Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with additional drones striking during the crew's evacuation attempt. Russian forces conducted airstrikes using FAB-3000 and FAB-500 bombs with UMPK on Ukrainian positions in Sumy region and Konstantinivka. Cluster RBK-500 bombs with UMPC were used against Ukrainian UAV launch sites near Maryevka in Dnipropetrovsk region and airfields in Shevchenko, Donetsk People's Republic. Ukrainian forces employed electronic warfare interference against FPV drones, while Russian mobile fire groups used the "Elka" anti-drone system to intercept Ukrainian strike drones at distances over 1.5 km.
